data.title: Implement gate-2d-dependency-check.sh
data.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2d-dependency-check.sh. The script:
- Accepts: file paths (positional args), --repo-root (default: git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
- Scans proposed fix files for import/require statements
- Checks against: pyproject.toml [tool.poetry.dependencies], package.json dependencies/devDependencies
- Also checks existing imports across codebase (grep for same import in repo)
- New dependency (not in manifest AND not imported elsewhere) -> triggered:true
- Existing dependency/import -> triggered:false
- Graceful fallback: no manifest files -> import-only analysis
- Partial manifest: pyproject.toml only -> check Python deps; package.json only -> check Node deps
- Emits gate signal JSON: gate_id "2d", signal_type "primary", triggered, evidence, confidence
- Always exits 0. Uses bash + grep + python3 (for TOML/JSON parsing, stdlib only)

TDD: GREEN — implement until Task 3 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2d-dependency-check.sh
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-gate-2d-dependency-check.sh
- [ ] bash -n syntax check
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2d-dependency-check.sh
